reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark evidenceStatus=satisfied only for the three current CLI guide decision packet and reviewable projection claims covered by focused tests, current command registry output, and explicit non-claims.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a deterministic product-owned review variant execution envelope.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused review variants tests covering blocked, failed, concern, unavailable_executor, partialSuccess, successfulVariantOutputs, and machine-readable reasonCodes, plus checked-in reporting contract guidance.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep execution envelope proof separate from semantic correctness of any review verdict.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a deterministic evidence aggregation packet boundary.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by evidence prepare-input and bundle tests that combine report, scenario_results, run_audit, and scenario_history into explicit source refs and prioritized signals, plus current command registry output.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep evidence-bundle proof scoped to explicit normalized inputs; raw host reader ownership remains outside this claim.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic reviewer-first HTML projection over existing packets.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused self-dogfood renderer CLI and runtime tests, current command registry output, and checked-in renderer source that keeps HTML projections read-only over JSON source packets.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep HTML projections read-only over JSON source packets; do not treat rendered HTML as a replacement source of truth.
